# PickSkill

> AI analyst that researches, models, and drafts equity work in plain English.
> Pulls live data from SEC filings, market feeds, and primary sources;
> produces decks, reports, and Excel models on demand.
> Free to try, paid plans from $15/month.

## Product

- [PickSkill chat](https://pickskill.ai/chat): The AI analyst — ask any finance question, get researched answers with sources, charts, and downloadable artefacts.
- [Pricing](https://pickskill.ai/pricing): Free / Starter $15 / Pro $39 / Power $129+ tiers. Differentiator is unlimited memory + file generation quota + auto-refresh portfolio quotes on higher tiers.

## Blog

- [What Is DCF (Discounted Cash Flow)?](https://pickskill.ai/blog/what-is-dcf): Practical guide to DCF — formula, the four assumptions that actually move valuation, common pitfalls, how to model your first DCF in under an hour. Worked examples + FAQ.
- [What Is WACC?](https://pickskill.ai/blog/what-is-wacc): The discount rate that decides every DCF. Covers formula, the four inputs that matter (risk-free rate, ERP, beta, after-tax cost of debt), why a 100 bp change moves valuation 8–15%, common pitfalls, and a 15-minute triangulation workflow.
- [What Is Free Cash Flow (FCF)?](https://pickskill.ai/blog/what-is-fcf): The number behind every honest valuation. Defines FCF, contrasts FCFF and FCFE, shows how to compute either from a cash flow statement in 60 seconds, and details the four pitfalls (SBC treatment, capitalized software, working-capital tailwinds, capex policy) that bend tech-company models.
- [How to Read a 10-K in 30 Minutes](https://pickskill.ai/blog/how-to-read-10k): What Wall Street actually reads in an SEC annual report. Maps the 15 numbered Items to the 4 that carry signal (MD&A, Financial Statements, Risk Factors, footnotes), with a 30-minute reading workflow, common mistakes, and the year-over-year diff technique professional analysts use on Risk Factors.
- [How to Build a DCF in 60 Seconds with PickSkill](https://pickskill.ai/blog/build-dcf-in-60-seconds): Step-by-step tutorial. Open a chat, paste a single prompt, get a sourced 5-year DCF in Excel — every input linked to the source filing, every assumption editable inline. Works on US, HK, and A-share tickers. Covers the four follow-up prompts that move the needle and the honest caveats about what 60 seconds can't do.

## Key facts

- Founded 2026.
- Multi-language web app (English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German).
- Eight technical-indicator dimensions in the portfolio dashboard: price, fundamentals, sentiment, capital flow, divergence, KDJ, MACD, support/resistance.
- File generation produces native .pptx / .docx / .xlsx via OfficeCLI, delivered as 7-day presigned download links on Cloudflare R2.
- Default LLM is OpenAI's gpt-5.5 family; Anthropic, Google Gemini, xAI, and local Ollama are supported via the same agent surface.

## Contact

- Website: https://pickskill.ai
- Feedback: https://pickskill.ai/feedback
